name: @calibre-onchain/parity
description: Cross-package parity harness: asserts the Discord bot's isAcceptedName (discord-bot/src/rank.ts) and the gateway's displayNameFor resolvable-leaf (gateway/src/resolver.ts) agree on which ENS names resolve to a non-empty user leaf, against one shared case table. Fails red on drift between the two independently-deployed services (#553).
